mapper.select: SELECT md.id, md.public_id::text AS "publicKey", md.code, md.name, md.type, md.action_key AS "actionKey", md.display_order AS "orderNo", FALSE AS checked FROM module_details md JOIN modules m ON m.id = md.module_id AND m.is_active = 1 WHERE md.is_active = 1 AND m.module_type_id = #{id} ORDER BY m.display_order ASC, m.id ASC, md.display_order ASC, md.id ASC

SELECT md.id, md.public_id::text AS "publicKey", md.code, md.name, md.type, md.action_key AS "actionKey", md.display_order AS "orderNo", CASE WHEN rmd.module_detail_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS checked FROM module_details md JOIN modules m ON m.id = md.module_id AND m.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.module_detail_id = md.id AND rmd.role_id = #{roleId} WHERE md.is_active = 1 AND m.module_type_id = #{id} ORDER BY m.display_order ASC, m.id ASC, md.display_order ASC, md.id ASC

SELECT md.id, md.public_id::text AS "publicKey", md.code, md.name, md.type, md.action_key AS "actionKey", md.display_order AS "orderNo", TRUE AS checked FROM user_groups ug JOIN roles r ON r.id = ug.role_id AND r.is_active = 1 JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.role_id = r.id JOIN module_details md ON md.id = rmd.module_detail_id AND md.is_active = 1 JOIN modules m ON m.id = md.module_id AND m.is_active = 1 WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND ug.is_active = 1 AND m.module_type_id = #{id} GROUP BY md.id, md.code, md.name, md.type, md.action_key, md.display_order ORDER BY md.display_order ASC, md.id ASC
